energyEfficiency.description: Based on 24h average energy consumption vs. baseline. Cost analysis includes current utility rates.

mechanicalHealth.status: Mechanical health is {{status}} with some variations. Based on 24h average running amps ({{runningAmps}} A) vs. baseline ({{baselineAmps}} A).
mechanicalHealth.description: Compressor runtime is determined by threshold: running amps > idle amps ({{idleAmps}}).

sidePanelChat.assistantDummyResponse:
I'm your maintenance and operations support assistant—your first point of contact for any equipment issue, question, or task across mechanical, electrical, HVAC-R, plumbing, industrial automation, and facilities systems.

**What I do:**
- **Diagnose issues**: Whether you have an error code, unusual symptoms, or performance concerns, I'll help identify the root cause
- **Guide repairs**: Step-by-step troubleshooting, safety checks, and repair procedures tailored to your specific equipment
- **Answer technical questions**: Installation, configuration, parts compatibility, maintenance schedules, calibration, and more
- **Interpret data**: Analyze sensor readings, telemetry, and operational metrics to assess equipment health
- **Connect you to specialists**: When deep expertise is needed, I'll route you to the right domain expert

**How I work:**
I draw on technical documentation, manufacturer guidelines, and cross-domain knowledge to give you practical, actionable answers. I always prioritize safety and will guide you through the right diagnostic steps before jumping to solutions.

What can I help you with today?
